title: inula setigera
intro: Inula setigera, also known as the Chinese goldenseal or setigera, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to China and Mongolia. Inula setigera is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant's roots and rhizomes have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and respiratory infections, offering benefits such as immune system support, anti-aging, and antioxidant protection. Inula setigera can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or decoction, making it a versatile remedy for maintaining overall health and well-being.
